subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. It would be great to schedule a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those windows works for you, please let me know your preferred time within one of them and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact details, including direct email addresses or phone numbers. For the appropriate public contact routes and company information, please refer to our public website.

Best regards
